title: Bloo Spa Moments Vitality Toilet Rim Block, Premium Toilet Cleaner with Essential Oils, Toilet bowl freshener with Relaxing and Long-Lasting Scent – 1 x Toilet Block.
features: Scent Experience - Enjoy an indulgent scent experience with Bloo Rim Block. This toilet cleaner releases an intense and long-lasting fragrance that soothes the senses
Natural Aromas with Essential Oils - The loo cleaner harnesses carefully selected, energising, balancing, and relaxing essential oils to create a feel-good atmosphere
4-Function Formula – Experience Bloo's 4-function toilet cleaning formula: Indulging fragrance, active cleaning foam, anti-limescale effect and dirt protection
Long-Lasting Freshness - Keep the toilet fresh for longer with Bloo toilet cleaner. The toilet bowl cleaner keeps the toilet clean and smelling fresh for up to 30 days
Easy to Use – Simply separate the carton from the blister bubble and hang the toilet cleaner rim block on the rim of the toilet where the water flow is best
description: Product Description Bloo Spa Moments Harmony Toilet Rim Block Cleaner - Experience a Relaxing, Long-Lasting Fragrance with Every Flush Escape from the outside world and enjoy some me-time with Bloo Spa Moments Rim Block. The toilet rim hanger creates a relaxing, long-lasting scent experience, transforming the toilet into a personal sanctuary. Enjoy an indulgent fragrance release with every flush that results in a cosy, feel-good atmosphere. The toilet freshener has a unique formula with luxurious essential oils, carefully selected to soothe the senses. Experience a clean and fresh toilet with Bloo's toilet freshener blocks 4 Function Formula (with patented technology):​ 1. Indulging fragrance – Releases a refreshing, long-lasting scent in the bathroom​ 2. Active cleaning foam - Cleans the toilet with every flush​ 3. Anti-limescale - Formulation prevents limescale forming​ 4. Dirt Protection - Prevents new dirt sticking Simply hang the scented toilet bowl cleaner hanger on the rim of the toilet bowl and adjust it to the flow of water. When the toilet is flushed, experience the cleanliness and freshness of soothing essential oil scents in the bathroom. The carton and basket are recyclable. To recycle the carton of the hanging toilet bowl cleaner, separate it from the blister bubble. Product benefits: • Relaxing scent experience with every flush • Intense, long-lasting fragrance • Natural aromas with soothing essential oils • 4-function formula cleans and freshens the toilet • Easy-to-use automatic toilet bowl cleaner " Ingredients Contains: 30 % Anionic Surfactants, 5-15 % Non-ionic Surfactants, Also Contains Perfume (Linalool, Alpha-isomethyl Ionone, Citronellol)
